name: BioCatch
description: BioCatch analyzes thousands of behavioral signals (mouse movements, device handling, typing patterns) via SDKs and APIs to detect account opening fraud, account takeover and authorised-push-payment scams for banks, fintechs and digital plat

seo.title: BioCatch — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: BioCatch: BioCatch analyzes thousands of behavioral signals (mouse movements, device handling, typing patterns) via SDKs and APIs to detect account opening frau

when_to_use: Authorized push payment scam detection for retail banks
Account opening fraud scoring via behavioral biometrics
Account takeover detection during authenticated sessions
Mule account detection through interaction pattern analysis
Step-up authentication trigger based on behavioral anomaly

pros: Behavioral biometrics catch scams that device signals miss
Strong track record on authorised-push-payment fraud
cons: Requires months of training data per app flow
Limited value outside financial and high-risk flows
SDK adds weight and privacy review burden
review.verdict: Best-in-class for scam and ATO detection in banking, but too heavy and expensive for generic SaaS fraud.
review.best_for: Banks and fintechs fighting social-engineering scams and account takeover at scale.
review.not_for: E-commerce checkout fraud or small apps without a mature risk team.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
